name: Check Advance
description_short: Check Advance is a check-cashing service located in Memphis, TN, offering financial transaction services during weekday business hours.
description_long:
Check Advance operates as a check-cashing service based in Memphis, Tennessee, serving the local community from its location at 3201 S 3rd St in the 38109 zip code. The company provides financial services to customers who need immediate access to funds through check conversion rather than traditional banking channels.

The company specializes in check-cashing services, allowing customers to convert paper checks into immediate cash. While specific service details beyond check cashing are not detailed on the available business listing, the company maintains standard operating hours during business days to serve its customer base.

Check Advance differentiates itself by maintaining a dedicated physical location in south Memphis with consistent weekday hours from 10:30 AM to 6:00 PM. The business operates Monday through Friday, providing accessible service windows for working customers. The company can be reached directly at (901) 398-1926 for pricing and service inquiries.

As a check-cashing provider, Check Advance serves customers who may lack traditional bank accounts, need rapid fund access, or prefer check-cashing services over depositing through banks. However, the company has no online reviews or ratings available, and the business listing contains minimal detail about fee structures, accepted check types, or additional services that may be available. Prospective customers should contact the business directly to understand pricing and service specifics.
pros: Dedicated physical location in south Memphis accessible to local residents
Extended weekday hours (10:30 AM - 6:00 PM) accommodate working customers
Direct phone contact available at (901) 398-1926 for service inquiries
Operates consistently Monday through Friday for reliable access
Established local business presence in Memphis market
cons: No online reviews or customer ratings available to assess service quality
Closed weekends and Sundays, limiting access for weekend needs
Website listing contains minimal service details or fee transparency
No information available about check types accepted or processing times
Limited information about additional services beyond basic check cashing
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Memphis residents needing immediate check conversion
Customers seeking local, in-person check-cashing alternatives to banks
Workers in south Memphis requiring convenient weekday service access
diagnosis: Check Advance is best for Memphis residents seeking a dedicated check-cashing location during weekday business hours. The main caveat is the complete lack of online reviews, transparent pricing information, or detailed service descriptions—customers should call directly to confirm services and rates before visiting.
